mock|mock-arch-s83|architect|test_arch_s.text: {"design_summary":"A task management web application with user authentication. Built with Node.js API and SQLite database, deployed as a single-server app serving authenticated users.","components":[{"name":"API Server","tech":"Node.js/Express","purpose":"Handles HTTP requests and business logic"},{"name":"Database","tech":"SQLite","purpose":"Persists users, sessions, and tasks"},{"name":"Auth Module","tech":"JWT","purpose":"Issues and validates authentication tokens"}],"data_flow":"Client sends HTTP request to API Server. Auth Module validates JWT. Business logic executes. SQLite is queried. Response returned to client.","technology_choices":[{"category":"language","choice":"JavaScript/Node.js","rationale":"Lightweight runtime; sufficient for CRUD workloads"},{"category":"database","choice":"SQLite","rationale":"Zero-config, file-based; appropriate for single-server MVP"},{"category":"auth","choice":"JWT","rationale":"Stateless tokens simplify horizontal scaling"}],"integration_points":[{"name":"REST API","type":"API","notes":"HTTP endpoints for tasks and users; JSON payloads"}],"identified_risks":[{"risk":"SQLite write contention under concurrent load","severity":"MEDIUM","mitigation":"Add write queue or migrate to PostgreSQL when concurrency exceeds single-digit RPS"}]}

mock|mock-spec-s86|spec_writer|test_spec.text: {"scope":"Build a task management REST API using Node.js and SQLite. The API will expose CRUD endpoints for tasks and users. mock|mock-sec-s96|scenario:S96.text: {"threat_level":"MEDIUM","findings":[{"severity":"WARN","vulnerability":"Missing rate limiting on authentication endpoint","location":"spec.acceptance_criteria/AC-2","attack_vector":"Attacker performs credential stuffing against POST /auth/login with no throttle applied","mitigation":"Add rate limiting middleware capped at 5 login attempts per minute per IP address"},{"severity":"INFO","vulnerability":"JWT secret management not specified in spec","location":"spec.decisions","attack_vector":"Hardcoded or weak JWT secret exposed via source code repository","mitigation":"Require JWT_SECRET via environment variable; fail startup if absent or shorter than 32 characters"}],"summary":"Specification has medium threat exposure. No blockers found. Rate limiting on the auth endpoint is absent and JWT secret management is unspecified. Address the WARN before build proceeds."}

mock|mock-sec-s97|scenario:S97.text: {"threat_level":"HIGH","findings":[{"severity":"BLOCKER","vulnerability":"SQL injection via unsanitized query parameter","location":"src/routes/tasks.js","attack_vector":"GET /tasks?user_id=1 OR 1=1-- bypasses user isolation and returns all tasks in the database","mitigation":"Use parameterized queries via better-sqlite3's prepare().get() with bound parameters only; never concatenate user input into SQL strings"},{"severity":"WARN","vulnerability":"Missing authentication middleware on DELETE endpoint","location":"src/routes/tasks.js","attack_vector":"Unauthenticated DELETE /tasks/:id removes any task without requiring a valid JWT","mitigation":"Apply JWT validation middleware to all DELETE routes before the route handler executes"}],"summary":"Code plan has high threat exposure due to a SQL injection blocker in the task route. This must be resolved before build proceeds. One additional warning about missing authentication on the DELETE endpoint."}

mock|mock-doc-s110|scenario:S110.text: {"overview":{"title":"Task Management REST API","purpose":"A RESTful API for managing tasks and users with JWT authentication, built with Node.js and SQLite.","key_capabilities":["User registration and authentication","Task CRUD operations","JWT-based access control"]},"components":[{"name":"API Server","description":"Express.js HTTP server handling all API requests","interface_summary":"Exposes REST endpoints on configured PORT; responds with JSON"},{"name":"Auth Module","description":"Issues and validates JWT tokens for authenticated routes","interface_summary":"POST /auth/login returns JWT; validates Authorization header on protected routes"},{"name":"Database","description":"SQLite file-based database for users and tasks","interface_summary":"Accessed internally by route handlers; not exposed externally"}],"api_reference":[{"endpoint":"/users","method":"POST","description":"Register a new user","inputs":"JSON body: { username, password }","outputs":"201 with { id, username }","errors":["400 if username taken","422 if fields missing"]},{"endpoint":"/auth/login","method":"POST","description":"Authenticate and receive a JWT","inputs":"JSON body: { username, password }","outputs":"200 with { token }","errors":["401 if credentials invalid"]},{"endpoint":"/tasks","method":"GET","description":"List tasks for authenticated user","inputs":"Authorization: Bearer <token>","outputs":"200 with [{ id, title, status }]","errors":["401 if token missing or invalid"]}],"quickstart":{"prerequisites":["Node.js >=20 installed","JWT_SECRET environment variable set"],"steps":["Install dependencies: npm install","Start server: node src/app.js","Send POST /users to register; POST /auth/login to get token; GET /tasks with token"]},"operations":{"health_check":"GET /health returns 200 OK when server is running","logging":"Request method and path logged to stdout at INFO level; errors logged at ERROR level","common_issues":[{"symptom":"401 on all requests","cause":"JWT_SECRET not set or changed","fix":"Ensure JWT_SECRET env var is set and tokens were issued with current secret"},{"symptom":"Database locked error","cause":"Concurrent writes to SQLite exceed capacity","fix":"Serialize write operations or migrate to PostgreSQL"}]},"known_limitations":["Real-time task sync is out of scope","Email notifications are out of scope","Frontend UI is out of scope"],"summary":"Documentation covers all 3 components and 3 API endpoints; intended for developer operators; covers happy path and 2 common error scenarios."}

mock|mock-dep-s113|scenario:S113.text: {"target_environment":"container","prerequisites":[{"item":"Docker >=24 installed on host","verified_by":"docker --version shows >=24.0"},{"item":"JWT_SECRET environment variable defined","verified_by":"echo $JWT_SECRET returns non-empty value"},{"item":"Port 3000 available on host","verified_by":"netstat -tuln shows port 3000 not in use"}],"build_steps":[{"step":1,"description":"Build Docker image from project root using the provided Dockerfile","artifact":"Docker image tagged forge-app:latest","notes":"No secrets should be baked into the image"},{"step":2,"description":"Verify image builds without error and contains node src/app.js entrypoint","artifact":"Image inspection output","notes":"Check CMD directive in image metadata"}],"deployment_sequence":[{"step":1,"description":"Create named volume for SQLite data persistence if not already present","requires_elevated_privileges":false,"is_irreversible":false,"notes":"Volume persists across container restarts"},{"step":2,"description":"Run container with JWT_SECRET env var and data volume mounted at /app/data","requires_elevated_privileges":false,"is_irreversible":false,"notes":"Use --restart unless-stopped for production"},{"step":3,"description":"Verify container started successfully by checking container logs for server listening message","requires_elevated_privileges":false,"is_irreversible":false,"notes":"Allow up to 10 seconds for startup"}],"rollback_procedure":[{"step":1,"description":"Stop the running container"},{"step":2,"description":"Start previous image version with same volume and environment configuration"}],"health_verification":{"method":"Send GET request to http://localhost:3000/health","expected_outcome":"HTTP 200 response with body OK","timeout_seconds":30},"post_deployment_tasks":["Verify POST /users creates a user","Verify POST /auth/login returns a valid token"],"deployment_risks":[{"risk":"SQLite data volume not mounted — data lost on container restart","severity":"HIGH","mitigation":"Always specify volume mount in run command; verify /app/data path in container"},{"risk":"JWT_SECRET not set — all auth will fail","severity":"HIGH","mitigation":"Check JWT_SECRET in environment before starting container"}],"summary":"Container deployment to Docker; critical path is volume mount and JWT_SECRET; top risk is data loss if volume is omitted."}

mock|mock|scenario:S247.text: {"design_summary":"منصة ويب لإدارة المشاريع مبنية على Node.js و React مع قاعدة بيانات PostgreSQL. تدعم إدارة المهام والتقارير التحليلية للفرق.","components":[{"name":"API Server","tech":"Node.js/Express","purpose":"معالجة طلبات HTTP وتطبيق منطق الأعمال"},{"name":"Frontend","tech":"React","purpose":"واجهة المستخدم التفاعلية للوحة التحكم"},{"name":"Database","tech":"PostgreSQL","purpose":"تخزين المشاريع والمهام وبيانات المستخدمين"},{"name":"Auth Module","tech":"JWT + bcrypt","purpose":"إدارة المصادقة والجلسات"}],"data_flow":"المستخدم يرسل طلب عبر React → API Server يتحقق من JWT → يستعلم PostgreSQL → يُعيد البيانات للـ Frontend.","technology_choices":[{"category":"backend","choice":"Node.js/Express","rationale":"خفيف وسريع، مناسب لتطبيقات CRUD"},{"category":"frontend","choice":"React","rationale":"مكتبة UI ناضجة مع نظام بيئي واسع"},{"category":"database","choice":"PostgreSQL","rationale":"قاعدة بيانات علائقية موثوقة تدعم المعاملات المعقدة"}],"integration_points":[{"name":"REST API","type":"API","notes":"نقاط نهاية HTTP بصيغة JSON للمشاريع والمهام والمستخدمين"}],"identified_risks":[{"risk":"ازدحام قاعدة البيانات عند تزامن الكتابة","severity":"MEDIUM","mitigation":"استخدام connection pooling وفهرسة الجداول بشكل صحيح"}]}

mock|mock|scenario:S254.text: {"scope":"بناء REST API لإدارة المهام باستخدام Node.js وSQLite. تشمل نقاط نهاية CRUD للمهام والمستخدمين. المصادقة عبر JWT. يُنشر كعملية Node.js واحدة.","decisions":[{"decision":"استخدام Express.js كإطار HTTP","rationale":"إعداد بسيط، مناسب لتطبيقات CRUD"},{"decision":"تخزين البيانات في SQLite عند data/app.db","rationale":"لا يتطلب عملية قاعدة بيانات منفصلة"}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","description":"POST /users يُعيد 201 مع معرف المستخدم على مدخل صالح"},{"id":"AC-2","description":"POST /auth/login يُعيد JWT على بيانات اعتماد صحيحة"},{"id":"AC-3","description":"GET /tasks يتطلب JWT صالح؛ يُعيد 401 بدون رمز"}],"files_to_create":[{"path":"src/app.js","purpose":"نقطة دخول Express"},{"path":"src/routes/tasks.js","purpose":"معالجات مسارات المهام"},{"path":"src/db.js","purpose":"اتصال SQLite وتهيئة المخطط"}],"files_to_modify":[],"out_of_scope":["مزامنة المهام في الوقت الحقيقي","إشعارات البريد الإلكتروني","واجهة مستخدم أمامية"]}

mock|gpt-4o|scenario:S258.text: {"scope":"نظام CRM ويب لإدارة العملاء والمبيعات. يشمل تسجيل العملاء وتتبع الصفقات والتقارير التحليلية.","decisions":[{"decision":"استخدام Node.js/Express للـ backend","rationale":"مناسب لتطبيقات CRUD بحجم المشروع"},{"decision":"قاعدة بيانات PostgreSQL","rationale":"تدعم العلاقات المعقدة بين العملاء والصفقات"}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","description":"تسجيل الدخول يُعيد JWT صالح على بيانات صحيحة"},{"id":"AC-2","description":"إضافة عميل جديد تُعيد 201 مع معرف العميل"}],"files_to_create":[{"path":"src/app.js","purpose":"نقطة دخول Express"},{"path":"src/routes/clients.js","purpose":"معالجات مسارات العملاء"}],"files_to_modify":[],"out_of_scope":["تطبيق موبايل","دعم متعدد العملات في المرحلة الأولى"]}
